competitors.aiSummary:

Management provided updates on liquidity recovery (~90%) and redemption reopening timelines, while awaiting official guidance from Drift regarding resolution steps.

Apologies for the error

The specificity of the metrics ($57.5209, 2.6%) appeals only to people already invested in that specific situation, eliminating broader resonance.
